milestones.title: Foundation & Design System
milestones.vision: Establish the full project scaffold, design system, CMS schema, and shared infrastructure so that all subsequent page-building milestones can move fast without re-solving foundational problems.
success_criteria: Astro + Sanity monorepo deploys to Vercel with preview URLs on every PR
Design tokens (color, typography, spacing) implemented with CJK font loading solved under 100KB
All base components render at 375px, 768px, and 1280px
Sanity Studio deployed with all document types and singletons
Form endpoint works end-to-end: Turnstile → Resend email
Sanity preview mode shows draft content on live site
SEO infrastructure: sitemap.xml, robots.txt, meta/OG component, JSON-LD helpers
Security headers configured
Lighthouse CI runs on every preview deploy
404 page and empty state patterns implemented

key_risks.risk: CJK font loading exceeds performance budget
key_risks.whyItMatters: Chinese fonts are 5-20MB unsubsetted — every ZH page fails Lighthouse if not solved in foundation

key_risks.risk: Design tokens don't translate 'gathered warmth' into code
key_risks.whyItMatters: Wrong typography/color/spacing decisions cascade through every page

key_risks.risk: Sanity schema needs rework after page building starts
key_risks.whyItMatters: Schema changes after content seeding are painful — must get document types right before M002

proof_strategy.whatWillBeProven: CJK font loads under 100KB with dynamic subsetting, no layout shift
Styleguide page with all tokens + components reviewed and approved
All document types created, sample content queryable via GROQ

milestones.verification_contract: All components render without errors at all breakpoints. Lighthouse CI passes. Form endpoint delivers email with valid Turnstile token.
milestones.verification_integration: Sanity webhook triggers Vercel deploy. Preview mode shows draft content. Components consume design tokens from shared system.
milestones.verification_operational: Preview deploys on every PR. Production deploys on merge to main. Security headers present on all responses.
milestones.verification_uat: Design tokens and components reviewed in-browser. Typography, color, spacing feel like 'gathered warmth'. CJK text renders cleanly alongside English.
definition_of_done: Monorepo deploys to Vercel with zero build errors
Sanity Studio accessible with all schema types
Design tokens on /styleguide page
All base components responsive at 3 breakpoints
Form endpoint tested end-to-end
Preview mode functional
Security headers verified
Lighthouse CI green on preview deploys
milestones.requirement_coverage: G3 (CMS maintainability), G4 (bespoke visual identity), G6 (Lighthouse targets), G8 (reusable template foundation)

# S01: Project Scaffold & CI/CD Pipeline

**Astro + Sanity monorepo scaffolded, deployed to Vercel with security headers and Lighthouse CI**

## What Happened

Built the complete project scaffold from scratch: Astro 5 monorepo with TypeScript strict mode, Sanity Studio placeholder, i18n routing for EN/ZH, sitemap integration. Connected to personal GitHub (public repo dillonlui/ficcc) via SSH. Linked Vercel project with auto-deploy on push — ficcc.vercel.app serving the scaffold with comprehensive security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy). Configured Lighthouse CI with strict thresholds matching all PRD performance targets. Documented everything in README with setup instructions.

## Verification

Build succeeds. Vercel deploys automatically. ficcc.vercel.app returns 200 with all security headers. Lighthouse CI passes all thresholds.

## Requirements Advanced

- G6 — Lighthouse CI pipeline established with >= 90 perf threshold

## Requirements Validated

None.

## New Requirements Surfaced

None.

## Requirements Invalidated or Re-scoped

None.

## Deviations

Used manual Astro init instead of create-astro CLI. Lighthouse config needed .cjs extension for ESM compat.

## Known Limitations

Sanity Studio uses placeholder projectId — replaced in S04. GitHub token not set for LHCI PR annotations.

## Follow-ups

None.

## Files Created/Modified

- `package.json` — Astro + Sanity monorepo configuration
- `astro.config.mjs` — Astro config with sitemap, i18n routing (en/zh)
- `tsconfig.json` — TypeScript strict mode with path aliases
- `src/pages/index.astro` — Placeholder index page with service info
- `src/lib/sanity.ts` — Sanity client helper
- `studio/sanity.config.ts` — Sanity Studio placeholder config
- `vercel.json` — Security headers (CSP, X-Frame, HSTS, etc.)
- `lighthouserc.cjs` — Lighthouse CI thresholds
- `README.md` — Project documentation
- `.env.example` — Environment variables template
slices.full_uat_md:
# S01: Project Scaffold & CI/CD Pipeline — UAT

**Milestone:** M001
**Written:** 2026-03-31T23:15:57.246Z

## UAT: Project Scaffold & CI/CD Pipeline

- [x] `npm run build` succeeds
- [x] `git push` triggers Vercel auto-deploy
- [x] ficcc.vercel.app returns HTTP 200
- [x] Security headers present (CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy)
- [x] `npm run lhci` passes all assertions
- [x] README setup instructions are followable
- [x] Git commits attributed to personal GitHub (dillonlui@gmail.com)
slices.goal: Working Astro + Sanity monorepo deployed to Vercel with automated CI/CD pipeline, Lighthouse CI on preview deploys, and GitHub remote configured with personal account
slices.success_criteria: Monorepo created with Astro site + Sanity Studio subdirectory. Git config set to personal GitHub. Remote added via personal SSH alias. Vercel project linked and auto-deploying. Lighthouse CI configured. README with project setup instructions.
slices.proof_level: CI green on scaffold deploy. Vercel preview URL accessible. Lighthouse CI report generated.
slices.integration_closure: Vercel project connected to GitHub repo with deploy hooks. Every PR gets preview URL. Merges to main deploy to production.
slices.observability_impact: Deploy status visible in GitHub PR checks. Lighthouse scores on every preview deploy.

slices.title: Design Tokens & Typography
slices.demo: /styleguide page showing full color palette, EN + ZH type scale, spacing scale
slices.goal: Establish the visual foundation — CSS custom properties for color, spacing, and typography — plus self-hosted font stack for EN and ZH, with a living /styleguide page showing all tokens.
slices.success_criteria:
- `npm run build` succeeds with no errors
- `/styleguide` page renders color palette, EN type scale, ZH type scale, and spacing scale
- Chinese characters render in Noto Serif SC (not system fallback)
- All pages use BaseLayout with global.css imported
- CSP in vercel.json no longer references Google Fonts domains
- `npm run lhci` passes all thresholds (perf ≥ 90, a11y ≥ 95, SEO ≥ 95, best-practices ≥ 90)
slices.proof_level: This slice proves: integration (fonts load, tokens render, layout composes). Real runtime required: yes (Lighthouse against built site). Human/UAT required: no.
slices.integration_closure: Upstream consumed: `package.json`, `astro.config.mjs`, `vercel.json`, `lighthouserc.cjs`, `src/pages/index.astro` from S01. New wiring: BaseLayout.astro wraps all pages, global.css imported once via layout. Remains: S03 builds components on top of this token system.
slices.observability_impact: Inspection surfaces: `/styleguide` page is itself the diagnostic surface — if tokens or fonts break, the styleguide shows it visually. Lighthouse CI catches perf regressions from font loading. CSP violations logged in browser console if font-src is misconfigured.

slices.title: Base Components
slices.demo: All components on /styleguide — Header, Footer, Hero, Cards, Accordion, Forms, ImageMosaic, AudioPlayer
slices.goal: Full responsive component library embodying gathered-warmth design language
slices.success_criteria: Every component renders at 375px, 768px, 1280px. Uses tokens exclusively. Keyboard navigable. Accessible markup.
slices.proof_level: Visual review at all breakpoints + axe-core zero violations
slices.integration_closure: Components are Astro components ready for page composition
slices.observability_impact: Accessibility violations caught by axe-core in CI

slices.demo: Sanity Studio with all document types. Sample content created and queryable.
slices.goal: Complete CMS schema with all document types, singletons, and modular content blocks
slices.success_criteria: 10 document types created. Singletons configured. Modular blocks defined. Sample content queryable via GROQ.
slices.proof_level: GROQ queries return expected data for all document types
slices.integration_closure: Astro data layer fetches all content types from Sanity
slices.observability_impact: Sanity Studio accessible at studio subdomain

# T01: Initialized Astro + Sanity monorepo with TypeScript, i18n routing, and personal git config

**Initialized Astro + Sanity monorepo with TypeScript, i18n routing, and personal git config**

## What Happened

Initialized the Astro + Sanity monorepo with TypeScript strict mode, sitemap integration, and bilingual i18n routing (en/zh). Set git identity to personal GitHub account. Created project structure with src/ for Astro site, studio/ for Sanity Studio, and lib/ for shared utilities including the Sanity client helper. Build succeeds and produces static output with sitemap.

## Verification

npm run build succeeds (1 page built in 345ms). git log shows commit with personal email (dillonlui@gmail.com).

## Verification Evidence

| # | Command | Exit Code | Verdict | Duration |
|---|---------|-----------|---------|----------|
| 1 | `npm run build` | 0 | ✅ pass | 345ms |
| 2 | `git log -1 --format='%an <%ae>'` | 0 | ✅ pass — Dillon Lui <dillonlui@gmail.com> | 50ms |


## Deviations

Used manual Astro setup instead of create-astro CLI (non-empty directory). Added Astro i18n config with en/zh locales upfront since bilingual routing is a known requirement. Added path aliases in tsconfig for cleaner imports.

## Known Issues

Sanity Studio config uses placeholder projectId — will be replaced in M001/S04.

## Files Created/Modified

- `astro.config.mjs`
- `tsconfig.json`
- `src/pages/index.astro`
- `src/lib/sanity.ts`

# T03: Vercel project linked with auto-deploy and security headers verified on ficcc.vercel.app

**Vercel project linked with auto-deploy and security headers verified on ficcc.vercel.app**

## What Happened

Linked Vercel project which auto-detected Astro framework and connected to GitHub repo. Created vercel.json with comprehensive security headers (CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy). CSP is tailored to allow all known external services (YouTube embeds, Sanity CDN, Turnstile, PayPal, Google Fonts). Push to main triggered auto-deploy. Production URL ficcc.vercel.app returns 200 with all headers verified via curl.

## Verification

ficcc.vercel.app returns HTTP 200. All 5 security headers present: CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy. Auto-deploy triggered by git push.

## Verification Evidence

| # | Command | Exit Code | Verdict | Duration |
|---|---------|-----------|---------|----------|
| 1 | `curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://ficcc.vercel.app` | 0 | ✅ pass — HTTP 200 | 500ms |
| 2 | `curl -sI https://ficcc.vercel.app | grep security headers` | 0 | ✅ pass — all 5 headers present | 500ms |
| 3 | `vercel ls (auto-deploy check)` | 0 | ✅ pass — deployment Ready, 24s build | 130ms |


## Deviations

Vercel auto-connected to GitHub on link — no manual webhook setup needed. Production URL is ficcc.vercel.app (auto-assigned).

## Known Issues

Deployment protection (401) on preview URLs — expected for Hobby plan. Production URL (ficcc.vercel.app) works fine.

## Files Created/Modified

- `vercel.json`

# T01: Installed Lora/Inter/Noto Serif SC via fontsource, created global.css with full Gathered Warmth design tokens, and built BaseLayout.astro wrapping index.astro

**Installed Lora/Inter/Noto Serif SC via fontsource, created global.css with full Gathered Warmth design tokens, and built BaseLayout.astro wrapping index.astro**

## What Happened

Installed three fontsource packages for self-hosted fonts. Created src/styles/global.css with CSS custom properties for the D007 Gathered Warmth palette (5 colors), 10-step spacing scale, modular EN and ZH type scales, line-height tokens, font family stacks, and a minimal CSS reset with :lang(zh) CJK support. Created src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro with typed Props (title, description, lang) that imports global.css and wraps content via slot. Migrated index.astro to use BaseLayout.

## Verification

Ran npm run build (success, 1 page in 392ms). Confirmed global.css and BaseLayout.astro exist. Confirmed index.astro references BaseLayout via grep.

## Verification Evidence

| # | Command | Exit Code | Verdict | Duration |
|---|---------|-----------|---------|----------|
| 1 | `npm run build` | 0 | ✅ pass | 2500ms |
| 2 | `test -f src/styles/global.css` | 0 | ✅ pass | 50ms |
| 3 | `test -f src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro` | 0 | ✅ pass | 50ms |
| 4 | `grep -q 'BaseLayout' src/pages/index.astro` | 0 | ✅ pass | 50ms |


## Deviations

None.

## Known Issues

None.

## Files Created/Modified

- `src/styles/global.css`
- `src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro`
- `src/pages/index.astro`
- `package.json`
tasks.description:
Install fontsource packages for Lora (variable), Inter (variable), and Noto Serif SC. Create `src/styles/global.css` with all CSS custom properties (color palette from D007 'Gathered Warmth', spacing scale, typography scale for EN and ZH), font-face imports from fontsource, and a minimal CSS reset. Create `src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro` that imports global.css, sets charset/viewport/lang, and wraps page content in a slot. Migrate `src/pages/index.astro` to use BaseLayout.

**Design tokens from D007:**
- Colors: off-white background (#FAF8F5), warm stone (#E8E0D8), muted terracotta (#C4745A), deep ink (#1A1A2E), body text (#2D2D2D)
- Fonts: Lora (headline serif), Inter (body sans), Noto Serif SC (CJK serif)
- Spacing: 4px base scale (4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64, 96, 128)
- Type scale: modular scale for both EN and ZH with appropriate line-heights (1.5 for Latin body, 1.7-1.8 for CJK body)

**Font loading:** Use `font-display: swap` for all fonts. Import variable font variants for Lora and Inter (`@fontsource-variable/lora`, `@fontsource-variable/inter`). Use standard `@fontsource/noto-serif-sc` which handles unicode-range subsetting automatically.

**BaseLayout:** Must include `<html lang>` attribute (parameterized for i18n), meta charset, meta viewport, slot for page content. Import global.css in the frontmatter.
tasks.verify: npm run build && test -f src/styles/global.css && test -f src/layouts/BaseLayout.astro && grep -q 'BaseLayout' src/pages/index.astro

tasks.title: Build /styleguide page showing all design tokens
tasks.description:
Create `src/pages/styleguide.astro` using BaseLayout. The page is the slice's demo artifact and S03's design reference.

**Sections to include:**
1. **Color Palette** — Render swatches for each CSS custom property color: background, stone, terracotta, deep-ink, body-text. Show hex value and variable name.
2. **Typography Scale (EN)** — Show each heading level (h1-h4) and body text in Lora/Inter with the actual font-size, line-height, and font-family.
3. **Typography Scale (ZH)** — Same heading levels and body text rendered in Chinese characters using Noto Serif SC. Use sample text like '伊的家華人基督教會' for headings and a paragraph of Chinese lorem for body.
4. **Spacing Scale** — Visual blocks showing each spacing token value (4px through 128px) with labels.

Each section should use semantic HTML (headings, definition lists or similar). Style the page itself using only the design tokens from global.css — no inline styles or additional CSS files. This proves the tokens are sufficient for real layout work.

Also update `lighthouserc.cjs` to add `/styleguide` to the URL list so Lighthouse CI tests both pages.
tasks.verify: npm run build && grep -q 'styleguide' lighthouserc.cjs && test -f dist/styleguide/index.html

tasks.title: Tighten CSP for self-hosted fonts and verify Lighthouse passes
tasks.description:
Now that fonts are self-hosted via fontsource (served from same origin), remove Google Fonts domains from the CSP in `vercel.json`:
- Remove `https://fonts.googleapis.com` from `style-src`
- Remove `https://fonts.gstatic.com` from `font-src`

The `font-src` directive should become `font-src 'self'` since all fonts are now local.

After CSP changes, run `npm run lhci` to verify:
- Both `/` and `/styleguide` pass perf ≥ 90 (the CJK font risk — styleguide is the heaviest page)
- All other thresholds pass (a11y ≥ 95, SEO ≥ 95, best-practices ≥ 90)

If Lighthouse perf drops below 90 due to CJK font weight, investigate: check total font transfer size, verify unicode-range subsetting is working (multiple small woff2 requests vs one large file), and consider preloading the most common CJK subset.

**Requirement G6:** This task is the gate — Lighthouse CI must pass with the full font stack loaded.

decisions.decision: Core tech stack for FICCC website rebuild
decisions.rationale: Astro provides static-first output with island architecture for interactive components. Sanity provides headless CMS with free tier covering 20 users and 10K documents. Vercel provides edge CDN deployment with free tier, preview deploys, and built-in analytics. Stack delivers zero-server-maintenance goal from PRD.

Zero cost, zero maintenance, already in the Vercel stack. Privacy-friendly, no cookie banner needed. Sufficient for church site traffic. GA4 available as future backup if deeper funnel analysis needed.

decisions.choice: Separate documents with language field, not i18n field duplication
decisions.rationale: EN and ZH content is bespoke per ministry, not translations. CM sermons are different sermons, CM fellowships are different groups. Language field on documents with GROQ filtering is simpler and lets each ministry own content independently. Shared nav structure with language toggle at route level (/ for EN, /zh/ for ZH).
Zero runtime cost, builds index at static generation time, ~5KB client bundle, supports CJK characters for Chinese content. Perfect fit for Astro static output.

decisions.choice: YouTube embeds via @FICCCenglish channel, Sanity stores metadata + video ID
decisions.rationale: Church already uploads weekly sermons to YouTube with structured naming (date, title, scripture). YouTube handles video hosting/bandwidth at zero cost. Sanity stores sermon metadata (title, speaker, series, scripture, YouTube ID) for filtering and search. No need for self-hosted audio/video.

decisions.choice: Humanist serif wordmark in both EN and ZH (no graphic logo)
decisions.rationale: No existing graphic logo. Text-mark in the serif headline font is consistent with the 'honest, not branded' design direction. Church name in both languages: 'First Ithaca Chinese Christian Church' / '伊的家華人基督教會'. Graphic logo may be created later.

decisions.choice: "Gathered Warmth" — humanist serif headlines, warm neutral palette, real candid photography, unhurried spacing
decisions.rationale: Design Language doc defines 6 tone descriptors (Unhurried, Rooted, Textured, Legible, Familiar, Honest) and the core frame of 'long-table hospitality' vs 'venue hospitality'. Typography: humanist serif (Lora/Cormorant) for headlines + clean sans (Inter/DM Sans) for body + CJK serif pairing. Warm neutrals (off-white, warm stone) with muted terracotta + deep ink primary. Real FICCC community photos are a hard requirement.

verification_evidence.verdict: ✅ pass — README present with project title
